美股與國際市場 ·

美 FTC 查安謀授權 關切自研晶片與 CPU 藍圖公平性FTC Probes Arm Licensing as Custom-Chip Push Draws Scrutiny

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460920

  • 彭博引述消息人士稱，美國聯邦貿易委員會正調查安謀半導體授權是否構成反競爭。
  • 調查重心包括其加強自研晶片時，是否藉拒絕授權或降低 CPU 藍圖授權品質卡位市場。
  • 消息公布後安謀盤後走弱，但今年以來股價仍明顯領先費城半導體指數。
  • 南韓去年已對安謀首爾辦公室啟動調查，據稱與高通投訴有關；雙方 Nuvia 合約爭議訴訟仍在。

據彭博引述消息人士，美國 FTC 正以反壟斷角度檢視安謀授權做法，並關注其推進自有晶片時是否影響 CPU 藍圖取得與品質；盤後回檔但未改強勁累積漲幅。韓國先前已發動調查，與高通圍繞收購 Nuvia 的爭訟也未歇。

  • Bloomberg cites people familiar as saying the U.S. FTC is reviewing Arm’s semiconductor licensing for possible antitrust harm.
  • The review asks whether tighter in-house silicon goals coincide with withheld or degraded CPU blueprint access.
  • The stock eased in after-hours trade but has sharply outperformed the PHLX Semiconductor Index year to date.
  • Korea inspected Arm’s Seoul office last year after an alleged Qualcomm complaint; the Qualcomm Nuvia contract fight continues.

Bloomberg sources say the FTC is probing Arm licensing for monopoly risk as it expands silicon efforts, testing CPU blueprint access parity.
